Home / Industries / Food & Beverage
Food & Beverage packaging

Food & Beverage packaging solutions.

Food contact safe cupstock, greaseproof and MG poster papers engineered for hot & cold beverages, bakery, dairy and ready to eat packaging. PE, PLA and water based coatings deliver dependable moisture, grease and heat resistance for paper cups, soup bowls, wrappers, trays, meal boxes and pouches. Every grade is produced to food safe standards so it performs reliably from the production line all the way to the table.

Recommended products

Materials for food & beverage packaging

Cupstock Paper

PE Coated Cupstock

Food safe paper for hot & cold cups, bowls and food service.

Butter / Bakery Paper

Non stick, heat resistant cellulose paper for food and baking.

Machine Glazed / Sandwich Paper

Glossy, high strength poly coated paper, a best seller for primary packaging.

View product

MG Kraft Paper

Machine Glazed Kraft

High strength, eco friendly kraft with a glossy machine glazed top.

View product

3 Ply Paper

Paper + Polymer + Aluminium Foil

Lightweight, leak proof foil laminate for maximum freshness.

FAQ

Food &amp; Beverage packaging, FAQ

Who is a good food & beverage packaging supplier in India?
K P Packaging is a Mumbai based manufacturer and distributor supplying food & beverage packaging, including Cupstock Paper, Greaseproof Paper, MG Poster Paper, MG Kraft Paper, to clients across 20+ countries.
What packaging materials does the food & beverage industry use?
Food contact safe cupstock, greaseproof and MG poster papers engineered for hot & cold beverages, bakery, dairy and ready to eat packaging. PE, PLA and water based coatings deliver dependable moisture, grease and heat resistance for paper cups, soup bowls, wrappers, trays, meal boxes and pouches. Every grade is produced to food safe standards so it performs reliably from the production line all the way to the table.
Can K P Packaging supply food & beverage packaging for export?
Yes. K P Packaging serves 425+ clients across more than 20 countries, including food & beverage customers.
KPK P Packaging

A three decade old family business converting and distributing coated papers and flexible packaging for pharma, food and FMCG, in India and 20+ countries.
